title: Task #1287: Fix Scheduler Connection EOF Errors in go-service
description: Address premature connection closure when notifying scheduler about finished queries

solution_components.purpose: Maintain persistent connections to scheduler service
implementation: Create connection pool with configurable size (default 10)
Add automatic reconnection on pool exhaustion
Retry on: EOF, connection refused, timeout

solution_components.purpose: Verify scheduler service availability before notification
Prevent premature closure and improve stability
implementation: TCP NoDelay: enabled for low latency

testing_strategy: Unit test: retry logic and backoff timing
Load test: high query volume with pool exhaustion
monitoring: Alert: Scheduler service unreachable for >5 minutes
